value:
Thanks for reaching out! I understand how frustrating it is when a promotion shows as added but the discount isn't appearing at checkout. This is something our team can definitely investigate for you—to do so, we'll need a bit more detail: could you share the error message and screenshots you mentioned, along with your account number? 

In the meantime, you can reach our support team directly via email or through the in-app help section, which may be faster than Twitter for account-specific issues like this. Once we have those details, we'll look into why the HDFC card discount isn't showing and get this sorted for you.
